# Architectural Review Session

Please conduct an architectural review of the .NET 8 console calculator application that has been refactored to include an Angular UI frontend. Assess the overall design, integration between the .NET backend and Angular frontend, scalability, maintainability, and adherence to best practices for migrating the local instance to a cloud-based solution in Microsoft Azure.
